name: Ghosts in the Graveyard
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the Oreos in a zip-style bag, using a rolling pin or food processor.
2. Make the pudding according to package instructions, using 3 1/2 cups of milk. Allow it to stand for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in 3 cups of the whipped topping and half of the crushed cookies into the pudding.
4. Spoon the mixture into a 13x9 dish. Sprinkle with the remaining crushed cookies.
5. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
6. Decorate with candy pumpkins, candy corn, Milos, and spoonfuls of whipped topping to create ghosts (pipe in chocolate eyes).
